revision.comment: fix extra non-breaking space in inline template
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{SAFESUBST:#invoke:Unsubst||type= |page= |link= |help= |$B={{#ifeq:{{{bigbox|yes}}}|yes|{{#invoke:Message box|ombox |class = mbox-tfd |type = delete |image = none |small = {{{small|no}}} |text = This {{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{type}}}}}|module|[[Help:Module|module]]|[[Help:Template|template]]}} is being discussed {{#if:{{{action|}}}|for {{{action}}}|in accordance with Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Deletion policy|deletion policy]]}}. Help reach a consensus at [[{{{link}}}|'''its entry''']]. {{#ifeq:{{{help}}}|off||---- ''[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] use only:
1. [{{fullurl:{{{link}}}|action=edit&editintro=Wikipedia:Templates_for_discussion/editnotice§ion=1}} Edit the TfD log] to create the discussion entry.
2. Please consider notifying the [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=history}} author(s)] by placing {{#Invoke:Template link general|main|code=on|subst=on|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{action}}}}}|rename|TfR|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{action}}}}}|renaming|TfR|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{action}}}}}|move|TfR|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{action}}}}}|moving|TfR|TfD}}}}}}}} notice|{{PAGENAME}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{type}}}}}|module|{{!}}module=yes}}}} ~~~~ on their talk page(s).'' }}}}{{#invoke:Category handler|main | all = | nocat = {{{nocat|{{#ifeq:{{Template:FULLBASEPAGENAME|{{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}}}|Template:Template for discussion|true}}|true}}} | category2 = {{{category|¬}}} }}|{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} |tiny = [[{{{link}}}|‹See Tfd›]] |inline = ‹The [[Help:Template|template]] ''[[Template:{{{page}}}|{{{page}}}]]'' is being [[{{{link}}}|considered for {{if empty|{{{action|}}}|deletion}}]].›  |infobox|box|sidebar =
‹ The [[Help:Template|template]] ''[[Template:{{{page}}}|{{{page}}}]]'' is being [[{{{link}}}|considered for {{if empty|{{{action|}}}|deletion}}]]. ›
|hide|disabled = |#default =
‹ The [[Help:Template|template]] below (''[[Template:{{{page}}}|{{{page}}}]]'') is being considered for {{if empty|{{{action|}}}|deletion}}{{#if:{{{otherpage|}}}| to {{{otherpage|}}}}}. See [[{{{link}}}|templates for discussion]] to help reach a consensus. ›
}}}}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates for deletion]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{SAFESUBST:#invoke:Unsubst||type= |page= |link= |help= |$B={{#ifeq:{{{bigbox|yes}}}|yes|{{#invoke:Message box|ombox |class = mbox-tfd |type = delete |image = none |small = {{{small|no}}} |text = This {{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{type}}}}}|module|[[Help:Module|module]]|[[Help:Template|template]]}} is being discussed {{#if:{{{action|}}}|for {{{action}}}|in accordance with Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Deletion policy|deletion policy]]}}. Help reach a consensus at [[{{{link}}}|'''its entry''']]. {{#ifeq:{{{help}}}|off||---- ''[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance]] use only:
1. [{{fullurl:{{{link}}}|action=edit&editintro=Wikipedia:Templates_for_discussion/editnotice§ion=1}} Edit the TfD log] to create the discussion entry.
2. Please consider notifying the [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=history}} author(s)] by placing {{#Invoke:Template link general|main|code=on|subst=on|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{action}}}}}|rename|TfR|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{action}}}}}|renaming|TfR|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{action}}}}}|move|TfR|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{action}}}}}|moving|TfR|TfD}}}}}}}} notice|{{PAGENAME}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{type}}}}}|module|{{!}}module=yes}}}} ~~~~ on their talk page(s).'' }}}}{{#invoke:Category handler|main | all = | nocat = {{{nocat|{{#ifeq:{{Template:FULLBASEPAGENAME|{{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}}}|Template:Template for discussion|true}}|true}}} | category2 = {{{category|¬}}} }}|{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} |tiny = [[{{{link}}}|‹See Tfd›]] |inline = ‹The [[Help:Template|template]] ''[[Template:{{{page}}}|{{{page}}}]]'' is being [[{{{link}}}|considered for {{if empty|{{{action|}}}|deletion}}]].›  |infobox|box|sidebar =
‹ The [[Help:Template|template]] ''[[Template:{{{page}}}|{{{page}}}]]'' is being [[{{{link}}}|considered for {{if empty|{{{action|}}}|deletion}}]]. ›
|hide|disabled = |#default =
‹ The [[Help:Template|template]] below (''[[Template:{{{page}}}|{{{page}}}]]'') is being considered for {{if empty|{{{action|}}}|deletion}}{{#if:{{{otherpage|}}}| to {{{otherpage|}}}}}. See [[{{{link}}}|templates for discussion]] to help reach a consensus. ›
}}}}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates for deletion]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
